claimText: The State and Trends of Carbon Pricing 2025 report is released by the World Bank Group.
evidenceExcerpt: State and Trends of Carbon Pricing 2025 report is released by the World Bank Group.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the publishing organization of the report.

claimText: Emissions Trading Systems (ETS) involve the government setting a cap on greenhouse gas emissions or emission intensity.
evidenceExcerpt: Emissions Trading Systems involve the government setting a cap on GHG emissions or emission intensity.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching carbon pricing instruments with their mechanisms.
distractorHooks: Government levies a fee on emissions
Generated through voluntary emission reduction activities

claimText: Carbon Taxes involve the government levying a fee on covered entities for their greenhouse gas emissions.
evidenceExcerpt: Carbon Taxes involve the government levying a fee on covered entities for their GHG emissions.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching carbon pricing instruments with their mechanisms.
distractorHooks: Government sets a cap on emissions
Tradable credits generated through voluntary activities

claimText: Carbon Crediting Mechanisms generate tradable credits through voluntary activities that reduce emissions.
evidenceExcerpt: Carbon Crediting Mechanisms generate tradable credits through voluntary activities that reduce emissions.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching carbon pricing instruments with their mechanisms.
distractorHooks: Government levies a fee on emissions
